commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; maintainer/security review should decide whether to land the focused auth-hook context change with the known compatibility risk.; Cleared: The diff restores hook context used by authorization/audit plugins and does not introduce new dependencies, workflow permissions, secret handling, or supply-chain changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR threads HookContext through Pi tool-definition adaptation for code-mode exec/wait dispatches, adds regression coverage for unwrapped tool definitions, and records a changelog fix.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows outer code-mode controls reach toToolDefinitions without ctx on current main, and runBeforeToolCallHook only forwards agentId when args.ctx is present.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; maintainer/security review should decide whether to land the focused auth-hook context change with the known compatibility risk.
